overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style RPG showing a character with a glowing blue jacket walking through a futuristic neon-lit bar. The character moves from the main counter area toward a restroom door at the back, passing various NPCs seated at bars and computer terminals.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar lounge with curved neon counter

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved bar counter, passing seated patrons on the left

notable_agents.action: patron in red shirt sitting at the bar counter, facing the bartender
patron in tactical gear sitting on a bar stool, drinking

entered.detail: illuminated bar counter with yellow neon strip lighting and bottles
metal mesh safety railing separating the walkway from the lower seating area
green and blue geometric neon light patterns on the back wall
modern black sofas and tables with glowing cylindrical lamps
glass and metal railing of the upper level overlooking the bar

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a futuristic bar's curved counter, illuminated by yellow neon lights. Patrons sit on stools to the left, while modern lounge furniture occupies the right side. The back wall features striking green and blue geometric neon patterns, and an upper level with glass railings is visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar seating area with computer workstations

events.description: passing a standing NPC guard near the wall computer terminals

agents.ego_description: continuing through the lounge area toward the back wall, moving past computer terminals

notable_agents.action: person in dark tactical gear standing with arms crossed near the computer terminals
patron in white shirt sitting at a computer terminal, typing

entered.detail: row of computer workstations with monitors against the striped wall
metal sliding door with illuminated signage at the back of the room

segments.scene_description: Moving past the main bar area, the character enters a section with computer terminals lining the left wall. A guard stands near the computers while another patron works at a terminal. The restroom door becomes visible at the far end of the room, and the neon wall patterns shift to the left side of the frame.

events.description: approaching the restroom door at the end of the bar area

agents.ego_description: walking toward the restroom door, preparing to enter the doorway

notable_agents.action: patron in white shirt working at a computer terminal near the wall

entered.detail: illuminated red RESTROOM sign mounted above the sliding door

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the metal sliding restroom door at the back of the establishment. The red illuminated RESTROOM sign becomes prominent above the door. A final computer terminal with a seated patron is passed on the left as the character reaches the doorway, concluding the walk through the bar.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic bar that transitions from a wide social lounge to a narrow corridor leading toward the restrooms. It begins by tracking the character along a curved counter illuminated by yellow neon, passing patrons on stools and lounge furniture beneath an upper level with glass railings. As the camera moves past the main bar area, the environment shifts toward a more functional space where computer terminals line the left wall and a guard stands watch. The scene then narrows as the character passes a final seated patron, with the geometric neon wall patterns shifting to the side to reveal a metal sliding door at the far end of the room. Finally, the camera closes in on the doorway as the red illuminated restroom sign becomes the focal point of the frame.
